title: Update column of a Sub-item using the API
excerpt:
Hi, 
Is there any way to update a column of a sub-item via API? 
My use-case: I have a due date in the Parent item. Every time this date changes, I need to adjust the dates in each sub-item. 
Any idea will be well welcom…

posts.author: Danielf (Daniel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

Is there any way to update a column of a sub-item via API?
My use-case: I have a due date in the Parent item. Every time this date changes, I need to adjust the dates in each sub-item.
Any idea will be well welcomed

Thanks,
Daniel

posts.author: Danielf (Daniel)
posts.cookedHtml: Made it happen ! It is tricky but works perfectly

posts.author: JEDuvall (Jordan Duvall)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Danielf -

That’s great to hear! Would you mind sharing what you did to make it work for anyone else who has the same question?

Thanks!
